name: Modular Medical, Inc.
summary: Modular Medical, Inc. (MODD) is a pre-revenue medical device company focused on designing, developing, and commercializing innovative insulin pumps. Their primary product, the MODD1, received FDA clearance in September 2024 and is a two-part patch pump targeting both Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes patients. A successor product, the Pivot, is a tubeless patch pump in development. The company aims to expand insulin pump adoption beyond highly motivated users into the broader mass market through simplified design, lower cost, and improved usability.

products.name: MODD1
products.description: FDA-cleared two-part patch insulin pump with reusable pump unit and disposable cartridge and set, offering basal and bolus insulin delivery.

products.name: Pivot
products.description: Successor tubeless patch pump integrating the infusion set, designed for improved cost, usability, and manufacturability over the MODD1.

products.name: MODD1
products.description: FDA-cleared two-part patch insulin pump with reusable and disposable components targeting Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes patients requiring daily insulin.

products.name: Pivot
products.description: Next-generation tubeless 3-milliliter patch pump in development, offering improved cost, usability, and manufacturability over the MODD1.

partnerships.description: Industry survey firm conducted a proprietary payor survey covering 50 million U.S. covered lives regarding coverage willingness for MODD products.
